name: @elumixor/release-ios
description: Bump iOS marketing version, commit, tag, and push — a one-shot release script for Capacitor/native iOS apps

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --sourcemap=external && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "Release v%s" && git push --tags && git push
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "Release v%s" && git push --tags && git push
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "Release v%s" && git push --tags && git push
